ponder.name: Ponder
ponder.longDescription: Some leads need time to breathe before they turn into something useful.

blue_modus_ponens.name: Modus Ponens
blue_modus_ponens.effectText: Draw a card. Create a Logical Chain.
blue_modus_ponens.longDescription: If the premise holds, the conclusion follows. A clean line of deduction that builds your case and keeps your hand full.

blue_modus_tollens.name: Modus Tollens
blue_modus_tollens.effectText: Pay 2 Patience. Create two Logical Chains.
blue_modus_tollens.longDescription: Deny the conclusion and the premise crumbles. Two chains of reasoning emerge from a single contradiction.

blue_anticipation.name: Anticipation
blue_anticipation.effectText: Pay 1 Patience. You can’t draw or break shields this turn. Destroy 2 tokens. Your shields can’t be broken until your next turn.
blue_anticipation.longDescription: Sacrifice your current momentum for an ironclad position. The tokens you destroy fuel a wall that protects you through the opponent’s turn.

blue_decisive_punchline.name: Decisive Punchline
blue_decisive_punchline.longDescription: Everything you’ve built leads to this moment. Sacrifice your chains of reasoning for a devastating cascade of leave-triggers.

blue_debunk.name: Debunk
blue_debunk.effectText: Pay 3 Patience. Destroy an opponent Impression. Create a Logical Chain.
blue_debunk.longDescription: Tear apart a false premise and replace it with cold reason. The destroyed impression fuels a new chain of logic.

blue_powerful_clarity.name: Powerful Clarity
blue_powerful_clarity.longDescription: A flash of insight that seizes the conversation and crystallizes into a tangible line of reasoning.

blue_package.name: Package
blue_package.effectText: Transform a Logical Chain into an Impactful Conclusion. Shield Trigger: transform up to 3.
blue_package.longDescription: Bundle a chain of reasoning into a devastating conclusion. Under pressure, package even more at once.

blue_hold_attention.name: Hold Attention
blue_hold_attention.effectText: Pay 1 Patience. Transform a Logical Chain into a Captivating Sense.
blue_hold_attention.longDescription: Weave your logical thread into something that holds their attention, building momentum when it finally releases.

blue_conversational_symmetry.name: Conversational Symmetry
blue_conversational_symmetry.effectText: Pay 1 Patience. +4 Priority. Transform a Logical Chain into a Captivating Sense.
blue_conversational_symmetry.longDescription: Mirror their energy back at them, transforming raw logic into an irresistible thread of conversation.

blue_timely_follow_up.name: Timely Follow-up
blue_timely_follow_up.effectText: This turn, whenever you would create a Logical Chain, create an Impactful Conclusion instead.
blue_timely_follow_up.longDescription: Strike while the iron is hot. Every logical thread you spin this turn lands with the full weight of a conclusion.

blue_crystallize.name: Crystallize
blue_crystallize.effectText: Pay 1 Patience. Destroy 2 tokens. Create a Logical Chain.
blue_crystallize.longDescription: Collapse two threads of reasoning into a single, refined chain — their leave-triggers fire as you forge something new.

blue_cold_hard_facts.name: Cold Hard Facts
blue_cold_hard_facts.effectText: Trap: When the enemy plays their 3rd card this turn, transform a Logical Chain into an Impactful Conclusion.
blue_cold_hard_facts.longDescription: Patience rewards the prepared mind. When they overextend, your reasoning crystallizes into something devastating.

blue_find_fallacy.name: Find Fallacy
blue_find_fallacy.effectText: Trap: When the enemy plays their 3rd card this turn, pay 2 Patience and gain +8 Priority.
blue_find_fallacy.longDescription: Spot the hole in their argument at the perfect moment. Their overconfidence becomes your opening.

blue_eloquence.name: Eloquence
blue_eloquence.effectText: Pay 1 Patience. Impression: When a token you control is destroyed, draw a card.
blue_eloquence.longDescription: Your eloquent phrasing lingers in the air, ensuring every conclusion you reach opens a new avenue of inquiry.

blue_sophistry.name: Sophistry
blue_sophistry.effectText: Transform all Logical Chains into Impactful Conclusions.
blue_sophistry.longDescription: Dress up every thread of reasoning as an unassailable conclusion. Intellectually dishonest, but devastatingly effective.

blue_lingering_words.name: Lingering Words
blue_lingering_words.effectText: Pay 2 Patience. Impression: When a token you control is destroyed, create a Logical Chain.
blue_lingering_words.longDescription: Your words echo in their mind. Every conclusion that lands spawns a new thread of reasoning to pursue.

red_baleful_shout.name: Baleful Shout
red_baleful_shout.longDescription: The room goes quiet. Three arguments collapse under the weight of a single, undeniable roar of authority.

red_violent_intent.name: Violent Intent
red_violent_intent.effectText: Pay 3 Patience. Break 1 Guard Shield. Draw a card.
red_violent_intent.longDescription: Make your intentions unmistakably clear. One defense crumbles, and the shock of it opens your next angle of attack.

red_exude_authority.name: Exude Authority
red_exude_authority.effectText: Pay 1 Patience. Draw a card. +1 Priority.
red_exude_authority.longDescription: A subtle shift in posture, a measured look. You need say almost nothing — the room does the work for you.

red_rally.name: Rally
red_rally.effectText: Pay 2 Patience, then restore 3 Patience. Draw 2 cards.
red_rally.longDescription: Pull back, regroup, breathe. The interrogation is a marathon, not a sprint — and you just found your second wind.

red_reframed_perspective.name: Reframed Perspective
red_reframed_perspective.effectText: Trap: When the enemy plays their 2nd card this turn, restore 3 Patience (net +2).
red_reframed_perspective.longDescription: Let them overcommit. When they exhaust their second line of attack, you reframe the entire conversation from a position of calm.

red_press_the_attack.name: Press the Attack
red_press_the_attack.effectText: Pay 4 Patience. If Patience is below 5, +4 Priority.
red_press_the_attack.longDescription: The encounter is slipping away — time to throw everything at it. Desperation becomes momentum when you refuse to back down.

red_charismatic_conviction.name: Charismatic Conviction
red_charismatic_conviction.effectText: Pay 1 Patience. Break 1 Guard Shield. Restore 3 Patience. If Patience is below 7, +3 Priority.
red_charismatic_conviction.longDescription: Tear one wall down, rebuild your composure, then press harder. Under pressure, your conviction is its own argument.

red_gravitas.name: Gravitas
red_gravitas.effectText: Pay 2 Patience. Impression: Whenever you break a shield, +1 Priority.
red_gravitas.longDescription: Your presence becomes the argument. Each defense you shatter earns you a moment longer in control of the room.

red_overwhelming_onslaught.name: Overwhelming Onslaught
red_overwhelming_onslaught.effectText: Pay 1 Patience. Break 1 Guard Shield for each card you’ve played this turn (including this one).
red_overwhelming_onslaught.longDescription: Each word lands harder than the last. Your momentum becomes a battering ram.

red_magnetic_rhetoric.name: Magnetic Rhetoric
red_magnetic_rhetoric.effectText: Pay 1 Patience. Restore 1 Patience for each card played this turn (including this one).
red_magnetic_rhetoric.longDescription: The longer you’ve been talking, the more persuasive you become. Your argument builds on itself.

red_passionate_persuasion.name: Passionate Persuasion
red_passionate_persuasion.effectText: Pay 2 Patience. Restore 1 Patience for each Priority point remaining after playing this card.
red_passionate_persuasion.longDescription: Raw conviction poured into every word. The more momentum you carry, the harder you hit.

red_vindication.name: Vindication
red_vindication.effectText: Pay 1 Patience. +1 Priority for each opponent shield you broke last turn.
red_vindication.longDescription: Yesterday’s victories become today’s fuel. Every defense you dismantled hands you another opening.

red_submit.name: Submit
red_submit.effectText: Pay 1 Patience. Break X Guard Shields, where X is how far Patience has fallen below its start.
red_submit.longDescription: The cracks are already showing. You press into every gap their exhaustion has left open.

red_commanding_aura.name: Commanding Aura
red_commanding_aura.effectText: Impression: Prevent all Patience gains for 3 turns. Once per play: when you break a shield, break one more.
red_commanding_aura.longDescription: Your authority fills the room. Every attack lands harder and their attempts to recover fall flat.

red_ultimatum.name: Ultimatum
red_ultimatum.effectText: Trap — persistent. Each time your opponent plays a card, pay 1 Patience. Expires at your next turn start.
red_ultimatum.longDescription: You’ve laid your terms and you’re not moving. Every word they speak digs them deeper.

red_intimidating_presence.name: Intimidating Presence
red_intimidating_presence.effectText: Impression: Once per turn, when your opponent plays a card, pay 1 Patience.
red_intimidating_presence.longDescription: You don’t need to move. The weight of your presence makes every action they take cost them something.

green_listening_ear.name: Listening Ear
green_listening_ear.longDescription: Sometimes the most powerful thing you can do is simply listen. Your attentive silence puts them at ease.

green_rally.name: Rally
green_rally.longDescription: A reassuring word, a moment of calm — your composure steadies everything around you.

green_emotional_connection.name: Emotional Connection
green_emotional_connection.effectText: Restore 2 Patience. The opponent reveals their hand.
green_emotional_connection.longDescription: You reach them on a level that has nothing to do with facts. For a moment, their guard drops entirely.

green_deep_understanding.name: Deep Understanding
green_deep_understanding.effectText: Restore 3 Patience. Look at the top 3 cards of the opponent’s deck.
green_deep_understanding.longDescription: Your empathy runs so deep you can sense what they’re about to say before they say it.

green_display_of_benevolence.name: Display of Benevolence
green_display_of_benevolence.effectText: Restore 10 Patience. If Patience is below 10, restore 15 instead.
green_display_of_benevolence.longDescription: An act of genuine kindness — no strings attached. When things are at their worst, your generosity overwhelms.

green_empathy.name: Empathy
green_empathy.effectText: {Rapport} Choose a number 1–10. Copy an opponent-deck card with that Priority cost into your hand. It costs that much Patience to play.
green_empathy.longDescription: You understand them so completely that you can mirror their thoughts. Their strategy becomes your own.

green_keeping_an_open_mind.name: Keeping an Open Mind
green_keeping_an_open_mind.effectText: The opponent plays with the top card of their deck revealed. {Rapport} Choose 1–10. If the opponent’s deck holds cards with that cost, draw that many.
green_keeping_an_open_mind.longDescription: Stay open to what they’re showing you. The more you understand their rhythm, the more ammunition you find.

green_engaging_insight.name: Engaging Insight
green_engaging_insight.effectText: {Rapport} Choose 1–10. If the opponent’s deck holds cards with that cost, restore 3 Patience per match. Otherwise pay 5 Patience.
green_engaging_insight.longDescription: A calculated read on their psyche. Get it right, and everything flows. Get it wrong, and the rapport backfires.

green_like_an_open_book.name: Like an Open Book
green_like_an_open_book.effectText: {Rapport} Choose 1–10. If the opponent’s deck holds 2+ cards with that cost, restore 5 Patience per match. Otherwise pay 10 Patience.
green_like_an_open_book.longDescription: You can read them like a book. But overconfidence is its own trap — miss, and they close off harder than before.

green_sensitive_deflection.name: Sensitive Deflection
green_sensitive_deflection.effectText: Trap: When the opponent breaks their 2nd shield of yours this turn, place 3 Placeholder Shields.
green_sensitive_deflection.longDescription: When they push too hard, you softly redirect. Three new walls rise as naturally as a change of subject.

green_disarming_word.name: Disarming Word
green_disarming_word.effectText: {Rapport} Trap: Choose 1–10. If the opponent stages a card with that cost, cancel it and restore that much Patience.
green_disarming_word.longDescription: A single well-placed word, spoken at just the right moment, and their entire argument unravels before it begins.

green_i_know_how_you_feel.name: I Know How You Feel
green_i_know_how_you_feel.effectText: The opponent plays with their hand revealed. Shuffles back into your deck after 2 of your turns.
green_i_know_how_you_feel.longDescription: You see right through them — every card on the table, every move they’re planning. But the clarity won’t last forever.

green_shared_perspective.name: Shared Perspective
green_shared_perspective.effectText: {Rapport} Choose 1–10. Copy two opponent-deck cards with that cost and a shield-break effect. They cost that much Patience to play.
green_shared_perspective.longDescription: You don’t just understand them — you think like them. Their best weapons become yours, wielded with ruthless precision.

green_genuine_enjoyment.name: Genuine Enjoyment
green_genuine_enjoyment.effectText: Pay 5 Patience. While this Impression is on the Field, the opponent cannot break shields. Destroyed if Patience falls below 15.
green_genuine_enjoyment.longDescription: Your warmth is disarming. They can’t bring themselves to push too hard — but only as long as you keep smiling.

green_to_truly_know.name: To Truly Know
green_to_truly_know.effectText: Rapport successes place counters here. At the start of your turn: 3+ counters break 3 Guard Shields, 5+ break 5, 10+ break 10. Destroyed if Patience falls below 10.
green_to_truly_know.longDescription: True understanding takes time. Each insight builds on the last until their every defense is laid bare.

orange_appeal_to_authority.name: Appeal to Authority
orange_appeal_to_authority.effectText: Until the end of your next turn, no shields can be broken.
orange_appeal_to_authority.longDescription: You invoke a higher power — a regulation, a precedent, an unimpeachable name. For a moment, both sides are frozen in place.

orange_by_the_law.name: By the Law
orange_by_the_law.effectText: Normal: −2 opponent Priority. Heavy Hand (double cost): also break one of your own shields. Shuffles back into your deck after use.
orange_by_the_law.longDescription: The law is a blunt instrument. Swing it lightly, and it nudges. Swing it hard, and something breaks — maybe even something of yours.

orange_exacting_decree.name: Exacting Decree
orange_exacting_decree.effectText: Normal: all cards cost +1 Priority (both sides). Heavy Hand (double cost): +2 instead. Lasts while this Impression is on the Field.
orange_exacting_decree.longDescription: A decree from on high. Every word now carries a surcharge, every argument an added toll. The bureaucracy has arrived.

orange_mind_tax.name: Mind Tax
orange_mind_tax.effectText: Impression (2 turns): gain 1 Priority whenever the opponent draws an extra card. (Heavy Hand variant pending — see porting notes.)
orange_mind_tax.longDescription: You plant a seed of suspicion. Every new piece of information the witness reaches for now costs them credibility.

orange_cognitive_burden.name: Cognitive Burden
orange_cognitive_burden.effectText: Both sides may only draw up to 3 cards at the start of each turn. Lasts while this Impression is on the Field.
orange_cognitive_burden.longDescription: The weight of what has been said settles over both sides. Thoughts come slower now, each one heavier than the last.

orange_strict_compliance.name: Strict Compliance
orange_strict_compliance.effectText: Both sides may only play up to 2 cards per turn. Lasts while this Impression is on the Field.
orange_strict_compliance.longDescription: The rules are clear. Two statements, no more. Anything beyond that is out of order.

orange_fair_provision.name: Fair Provision
orange_fair_provision.effectText: Trap — persistent: restore 2 Patience each time the opponent plays a card. Expires at your next turn start.
orange_fair_provision.longDescription: You establish a principle of fairness. Every word they speak now strengthens your position.

orange_equal_ground.name: Equal Ground
orange_equal_ground.effectText: While this Impression is on the Field, your Priority cannot drop below −3.
orange_equal_ground.longDescription: You draw a line in the sand. No matter how hard they push, there is a floor beneath you.

orange_gross_oversight.name: Gross Oversight
orange_gross_oversight.effectText: Trap: When the opponent stages a card that would break shields, cancel it and restore 1 Patience per prevented break.
orange_gross_oversight.longDescription: You spot the flaw in their argument before it lands. The attack crumbles, and you feel vindicated.

orange_artful_injunction.name: Artful Injunction
orange_artful_injunction.effectText: Until the end of your next turn, the opponent cannot draw extra cards. (Priority-per-blocked-draw rider pending — see porting notes.)
orange_artful_injunction.longDescription: You file an injunction. The witness may speak, but they may not reach for new material.

orange_semantic_quagmire.name: Semantic Quagmire
orange_semantic_quagmire.effectText: Trap: At the end of an opponent turn in which they drew extra, broke a shield, and gained Priority — +5 Priority now, +3 more at your next turn start.
orange_semantic_quagmire.longDescription: The more they do, the deeper they sink. Every action feeds the quagmire.

orange_generous_concession.name: Generous Concession
orange_generous_concession.effectText: Trap — persistent: restore 1 Patience for every Priority the opponent spends. Expires at your next turn start.
orange_generous_concession.longDescription: You concede the floor graciously. Their every assertion only makes you more patient.

orange_double_edged_approach.name: Double-edged Approach
orange_double_edged_approach.effectText: Trap — persistent: when the opponent breaks one of your shields, break an additional one of your own.
orange_double_edged_approach.longDescription: You lean into the blow. The pain doubles, but so does the resolve.

fcp_youre_a_hindrance.name: You're a Hindrance
fcp_youre_a_hindrance.longDescription: The fan sees you as nothing but an obstacle between them and their idol.

fcp_panicked_memories.name: Panicked Memories
fcp_panicked_memories.longDescription: Disturbing recollections surface when defenses are broken.

fcp_moment_of_clarity.name: Moment of Clarity
fcp_moment_of_clarity.longDescription: A fleeting instant of lucidity breaks through the obsession.

fcp_idols_favor.name: Idol's Favor
fcp_idols_favor.effectText: Devotion accumulates here. At 10: consume 10 — break 3 shields on both sides, drain 3 Patience. When all Guard Shields are down: transforms into My Idol.
fcp_idols_favor.longDescription: The idol's influence radiates outward, growing stronger with every act of devotion.

fcp_my_idol.name: My Idol
fcp_my_idol.effectText: At the start of the fan’s turn: +5 Priority, break 3 of your shields, drain 3 Patience.
fcp_my_idol.longDescription: The idol takes form — every turn begins with devastation.

fcp_im_his.name: I'm His
fcp_im_his.longDescription: A declaration of possession — the fan stakes their claim and fortifies their resolve.

fcp_blind_loyalty.name: Blind Loyalty
fcp_blind_loyalty.longDescription: Unwavering devotion becomes an impenetrable wall of denial.

fcp_he_loves_me.name: He Loves Me
fcp_he_loves_me.longDescription: Love is a weapon. The idol's affection leaves scars.

fcp_he_really_loves_me.name: He Really Loves Me
fcp_he_really_loves_me.longDescription: Doubled devotion, doubled destruction. The idol is always watching.

fcp_im_never_alone.name: I'm Never Alone
fcp_im_never_alone.longDescription: The presence is always there — in the mirrors, in the silence, in the next card drawn.

fcp_fantasy.name: FANtasy
fcp_fantasy.longDescription: Lost in a world where every fantasy feels real and every reality feels staged.

fcp_complete_devotion.name: Complete Devotion
fcp_complete_devotion.effectText: All devotion gains are amplified: +1 extra per gain.
fcp_complete_devotion.longDescription: Total surrender to the cause. Every act of worship echoes louder.

fcp_his_loyal_fan.name: His Loyal Fan
fcp_his_loyal_fan.effectText: Trap: At the end of your turn, +1 devotion per shield you broke that turn.
fcp_his_loyal_fan.longDescription: Every attack on the idol only deepens the fan's obsession.

fcp_deranged_witness.name: Deranged Witness
fcp_deranged_witness.effectText: +4 devotion. Sacrifice 2 own Guard Shields. Drain 3 Patience.
fcp_deranged_witness.longDescription: Sanity crumbles under the weight of devotion. Self-destruction becomes an offering.

fcp_my_only_meaning.name: My Only Meaning
fcp_my_only_meaning.effectText: +10 devotion. Reshuffle the discard pile back into the deck.
fcp_my_only_meaning.longDescription: There is nothing else. No other purpose. Just the idol.

fcp_and_hes_mine.name: And He's Mine
fcp_and_hes_mine.effectText: +1 devotion per Guard Shield placed this turn. Break 1 of your shields per Guard placed.
fcp_and_hes_mine.longDescription: Possession made manifest. Every wall built becomes a weapon wielded.

fcp_impenetrable_insanity.name: Impenetrable Insanity
fcp_impenetrable_insanity.effectText: You cannot break shields during your next turn. The fan gains +1 Priority per devotion.
fcp_impenetrable_insanity.longDescription: Madness becomes armor. The deeper the obsession, the more unassailable the defenses.

fcp_lunatic_love.name: Lunatic Love
fcp_lunatic_love.effectText: The fan’s cards cost +1 Priority and drain 1 Patience each. Lasts while this Impression is on the Field. (Devotion-pays-Priority rider pending — see porting notes.)
fcp_lunatic_love.longDescription: Love twists into something dangerous — every word they speak costs more, but devotion fuels the fire.

fcp_distracting_madness.name: Distracting Madness
fcp_distracting_madness.effectText: Trap: At the start of your turn, you cannot draw extra cards that turn. +2 devotion.
fcp_distracting_madness.longDescription: Their madness is a distraction — while you struggle to think, their obsession only grows.

fcp_unhinged_focus.name: Unhinged Focus
fcp_unhinged_focus.effectText: Trap: At the start of your turn, you cannot restore Patience that turn.
fcp_unhinged_focus.longDescription: Their focus is absolute, unnervingly so — nothing you say can calm them now.

fcp_youll_never_tear_us_apart.name: You'll Never Tear Us Apart
fcp_youll_never_tear_us_apart.longDescription: An unshakeable bond — nothing can separate the fan from their idol.

fcp_fans_solace.name: Fan's Solace
fcp_fans_solace.longDescription: Even in defeat, the fan draws comfort from their devotion.

fcp_crippling_fear.name: Crippling Fear
fcp_crippling_fear.effectText: Shield Trigger: the breaker loses 3 Priority.
fcp_crippling_fear.longDescription: Fear grips them when you get too close to the truth about what they saw.

fcp_it_wasnt_me.name: It Wasn't Me
fcp_it_wasnt_me.longDescription: Denial is a shield of its own — they cling to the lie that they were never involved.

dev_push.name: Push
dev_push.longDescription: A forceful line of questioning that shatters one of the NPC's defences.

dev_nudge.name: Nudge
dev_nudge.longDescription: A subtle provocation that spends a little of the conversation's goodwill.

dev_hold.name: Hold Ground
dev_hold.effectText: No effect when played. Safety: breaks as a shield for 0 Patience.
dev_hold.longDescription: Brace yourself defensively. As a shield, the Safety keyword makes its break cost nothing.

dev_quick_retort.name: Quick Retort
dev_quick_retort.longDescription: A sharp comeback that seizes back momentum in the conversation.

dev_enemy_dismiss.name: Dismiss
dev_enemy_dismiss.longDescription: The NPC dismisses your defences, breaking through one of your shields.

dev_enemy_deflect.name: Deflect
dev_enemy_deflect.longDescription: The NPC deflects your approach, stalling for time.

info_warehouse_logs.name: Warehouse Logs
info_warehouse_logs.longDescription: Shipping manifests from the riverside warehouse. Someone was there after hours.

info_personal_history.name: Personal History
info_personal_history.longDescription: Court records and old letters. The informant’s troubles are closer to home than they admit.

info_incident_report.name: Incident Report
info_incident_report.longDescription: The official report of the incident — with a witness line left conspicuously blank.

info_fan_letters.name: Bundle of Fan Letters
info_fan_letters.longDescription: Hundreds of letters, all unsent. The handwriting deteriorates with each one.

info_idol_schedule.name: Idol's Tour Schedule
info_idol_schedule.longDescription: A tour schedule annotated in two different pens — one of them not the fan’s.

info_passcode.name: Backstage Passcode
info_passcode.longDescription: A four-digit code scrawled on a ticket stub. Only staff should know it.

info_physical_traces.name: Physical Traces
info_physical_traces.longDescription: Fibres from a fan-club jacket, found where no fan should ever have stood.

info_witness_statements.name: Witness Statements
info_witness_statements.longDescription: Three accounts of the same night. All three mention the president of the fan club.

dev_token_informant.name: Informant Contact
dev_token_informant.effectText: A contact on the field. {1}: Draw 1 card.

logical_chain.name: Logical Chain
logical_chain.effectText: When this leaves the field, draw a card. {1}: Destroy this token.

captivating_sense.name: Captivating Sense
captivating_sense.effectText: When this leaves the field, gain 3 Priority. {1}: Destroy this token.

impactful_conclusion.name: Impactful Conclusion
impactful_conclusion.effectText: When this leaves the field, break 2 opponent Guard Shields. {4}: Destroy this token.

dev_token_informant.name: Informant Contact
dev_token_informant.effectText: A contact on the field. {1}: Draw 1 card.

logical_chain.name: Logical Chain
logical_chain.effectText: When this leaves the field, draw a card. {1}: Destroy this token.

captivating_sense.name: Captivating Sense
captivating_sense.effectText: When this leaves the field, gain 3 Priority. {1}: Destroy this token.

impactful_conclusion.name: Impactful Conclusion
impactful_conclusion.effectText: When this leaves the field, break 2 opponent Guard Shields. {4}: Destroy this token.

warehouse_activity.name: Warehouse Activity
warehouse_activity.description: Something moved through the riverside warehouse after hours — and the informant knows it.

personal_troubles.name: Personal Troubles
personal_troubles.description: The informant’s hesitation is personal, not professional.

witnessed_incident.name: The Witnessed Incident
witnessed_incident.description: The informant saw the incident happen — and is afraid to say so.

fcp_fan_letters.name: The Unsent Letters
fcp_fan_letters.description: The fan club president wrote to the idol daily. None of the letters were ever sent.

fcp_idol_schedule.name: The Annotated Schedule
fcp_idol_schedule.description: Someone tracked the idol’s movements far too precisely for an ordinary fan.

fcp_passcode_knowledge.name: Backstage Passcode
fcp_passcode_knowledge.description: The president knew the backstage door code the night of the incident.

fcp_physical_traces.name: Physical Traces
fcp_physical_traces.description: Physical evidence places a fan-club jacket backstage.

fcp_witness_statements.name: Witness Statements
fcp_witness_statements.description: Multiple witnesses put the fan club president at the scene.

opponentShields.loreDescription: They looked away when you mentioned the warehouse.
A hint: your subject is hiding something personal, not professional.
The real secret: they witnessed the incident but are afraid to speak.

nuggetOverrides.effectText: Pay 2 Patience. Draw a card. (Confronting them with the logs rattles them.)
Restore 2 Patience. (Showing you understand their situation calms them.)
Break 1 Guard Shield. (The report leaves them nowhere to hide.)

traits.name: Nervous
traits.description: Cards with Intimidate have no effect.

opponentShields.hintText: A crack in their obsession — push harder.
opponentShields.loreDescription: For a fleeting moment, they see the truth.
Fear grips them — they know what they saw.
Desperate denial — they cling to the lie.

nuggetOverrides.effectText: Restore 3 Patience. (Handling the letters gently earns a sliver of trust.)
Draw 2 cards. (The annotations tell you exactly what to ask next.)
Pay 3 Patience. Break 1 Guard Shield. (Reciting the code shakes them badly.)
Break 1 Guard Shield. (The evidence is impossible to wave away.)
Pay 2 Patience. Draw a card. (Three accounts, one name. They flinch.)
